HGSS.674.0001:
I’m researching Gym Leaders for a
project at school!\f
You can get the Gym Leaders’ phone
numbers, so you can talk to them\r
outside of the Gym!\f
Hey, we should trade phone
numbers! [0200,0000]
HGSS.674.0002:
The Gym Leaders’ locations and times
change, so I’ll let you know by phone!
HGSS.674.0003:
Huh? Don’t you want to know anything
about Gym Leaders?
HGSS.674.0004:
I knew it. I knew you’d want to
know about the Gym Leaders! [0200,0000]
HGSS.674.0005:
Hey, you’re nearby, aren’t you?
So we should talk face-to-face!
HGSS.674.0006:
Whitney likes to relax on the
sixth floor of the Goldenrod\r
Department Store.
HGSS.674.0007:
Janine delivers dinner to her father
every evening. You can always find her\r
at the Pokémon League Reception Gate\r
in the late afternoon!
HGSS.674.0008:
Falkner likes to come to Celadon City on
Mondays, it seems.
HGSS.674.0009:
It seems like Misty really likes
Route 25!\f
Every night she goes there to watch
the sunset!
HGSS.674.0010:
Sabrina likes to visit the port in Olivine
on Friday nights.\f
She really shows up in the strangest
places, doesn’t she!
HGSS.674.0011:
Maybe I should only tell you this...\f
The truth is that Jasmine is a bit of a
big eater!\f
If you go to the Olivine Café past
noon, you’re sure to run into\r
Jasmine there!
HGSS.674.0012:
Cinnabar Gym’s leader Blaine really
thinks a lot about the town of\r
Cinnabar, you know?\f
Every Tuesday morning he sits on the
site where the Cinnabar Gym once was\r
and contemplates.
HGSS.674.0013:
Pewter Gym’s Leader Brock really loves
rocks!\f
He goes into DIGLETT’s Cave every day
past noon.
HGSS.674.0014:
Bugsy goes looking for Bug-type
Pokémon. He even goes looking as far as\r
the Viridian Forest in the Kanto region!
HGSS.674.0015:
Pryce is certainly a man of refined
tastes, don’t you agree?\f
Every morning at seven he goes out by
himself and gazes out at the\r
Lake of Rage.
HGSS.674.0016:
Morty’s always looking at the
Bell Tower, isn’t he?\f
He’s just been engrossed by that one
thing. To the point that he became a\r
Gym Leader.
HGSS.674.0017:
I really need to work on my training.
Let’s battle again, OK? I’ll be\r
waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.674.0018:
Is that all right?
We’re going to battle again on\r
[0104,0003,0000]! Hurry up already!
HGSS.674.0019:
If anything about the Gym Leaders
changes, I’ll be sure to call you!
